description: Details of an oath to be taken by Abu al-Ḥasan Qasim as demanded by the haver Yiṣḥaq b. Avraham with regard to a consignment of cinnabar which had to be delivered by his servant to Ḥasan b. Ḥasan in al-Mahdiyya. This document was written in Denia, Spain, in 1083 - according to another written deed on the same issue (PGPID 7271). (Information from Goitein index cards)
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
